mapper.select: SELECT cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS cancerStudyIdentifier, sample.stable_id AS sampleStableId, sample_embedding.embedding_type AS embeddingType, sample_embedding.embedding_name AS embeddingName, sample_embedding.x AS x, sample_embedding.y AS y, sample_embedding.z AS z FROM sample_embedding INNER JOIN sample ON sample_embedding.sample_id = sample.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study ON sample_embedding.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id WHERE cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId}

SELECT cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier AS cancerStudyIdentifier, sample.stable_id AS sampleStableId, sample_embedding.embedding_type AS embeddingType, sample_embedding.embedding_name AS embeddingName, sample_embedding.x AS x, sample_embedding.y AS y, sample_embedding.z AS z FROM sample_embedding INNER JOIN sample ON sample_embedding.sample_id = sample.internal_id INNER JOIN cancer_study ON sample_embedding.cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id WHERE cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId} AND sample_embedding.embedding_name = #{embeddingName}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sample_embedding ( cancer_study_id, sample_id, embedding_type, embedding_name, x, y, z ) VALUES
( (SELECT cancer_study_id FROM cancer_study WHERE cancer_study_identifier = #{item.cancerStudyIdentifier}), (SELECT internal_id FROM sample INNER JOIN cancer_study ON sample.patient_id IN (SELECT internal_id FROM patient WHERE cancer_study_id = cancer_study.cancer_study_id) WHERE sample.stable_id = #{item.sampleStableId} AND cancer_study.cancer_study_identifier = #{item.cancerStudyIdentifier} LIMIT 1), #{item.embeddingType}, #{item.embeddingName}, #{item.x}, #{item.y}, #{item.z} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE x = VALUES(x), y = VALUES(y), z = VALUES(z)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sample_embedding WHERE cancer_study_id = (SELECT cancer_study_id FROM cancer_study WHERE cancer_study_identifier = #{studyId})
